prompt:
Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: character-free 16:9 background plate for scene 6
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style reference only
Primary request: peaceful mountain-temple courtyard at sunrise with a simple wooden pulley and rope system leading toward a full water jar, showing an ingenious shared routine
Style/medium: approved handcrafted Chinese paper collage, layered rice paper, torn edges, fine fibers and restrained ink lines
Composition/framing: wide celebratory ending, pulley and jar readable but leave open spaces for three working character cutouts; calm lower subtitle area
Lighting/mood: bright, warm, satisfying and hopeful
Constraints: no people, no animals, no text, no logo, no watermark, no modern machinery, original design
